name: Ronald Dy Tioco Jr
title: Senior Full-Stack Software Developer
summary: Strategic Senior Software Developer with extensive expertise in architecting scalable full-stack applications and managing complex cloud ecosystems (AWS & Microsoft Azure). Specialized in bridging high-performance back-end architectures with sophisticated, reactive front-end interfaces. Proven track record of delivering high-availability solutions for major educational and social service clients within Agile environments, driving technical excellence throughout the full Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC).

about.bio: I'm a passionate software developer with experience building modern web applications using various frameworks and technologies. My work focuses on creating performant, accessible user experiences that are both beautiful and functional.

responsibilities: Full-Stack Architecture: Spearhead end-to-end development of scalable web applications using Laravel and Angular, focusing on optimizing system processing efficiency.
Cloud Infrastructure & High Availability: Architect and manage robust cloud environments utilizing AWS (EC2, S3, RDS) and Microsoft Azure to ensure high availability for international user bases.
Reactive Programming: Implement advanced asynchronous patterns with RxJS to optimize front-end state management and enhance user interface responsiveness.
Design-to-Code Workflow: Collaborate closely with UI/UX designers via Figma to translate complex wireframes into high-fidelity, responsive components, accelerating the development lifecycle.
API & Integration Management: Streamline data exchange through rigorous API design and Postman testing, improving cross-service reliability and system integration.

clients.name: Fei Yue (Educational Client)
projects: Early Intervention Programme for Infants and Children (EIPIC)

responsibilities: Contributed to the development of enterprise-grade frontend and backend features within a professional SDLC framework.
Participated in daily Agile stand-ups and collaborative sprints, contributing to the successful delivery of project milestones.

Cloud, DevOps & Infrastructure: AWS (EC2, ECS, RDS, S3, CloudFront, VPC)

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Information Technology
